chunks.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati： Exercise 3 - Solution & Shoutouts
chunks.text: Namaskar, ladies and gentlemen, I am Mitabh Bachchan and you are watching Kaun Panega Crorepati.  So welcome back to 100 days of code.  I gave you an exercise and I told you that you have to write a python program with which people can play Kaun Panega Crorepati.  In today's video, we are going to see this and I will show you how the Kaun Panega Crorepati game can be made in Python programming.  I will give a shoutout to people because I know I will get to see a lot of amazing replicas of you guys.

So first of all, without wasting time, I want to show you how this program is written.  And after writing this program, we will see who solved it and how dangerous it is.  I want to give you a shoutout from the bottom of my heart if you have made something good.
